product_title: Pentagon Pro 8 Wheels 55Cm Cabin Trolley Bag Hard Case Polypropylene, 360º Wheeling Carry On Luggage for Men & Women, Travel Suitcase, Cyan
review_body:
The bag quality is really good and feels sturdy. The outer shell is strong, the design looks premium, and the wheels move smoothly overall. Size and storage are perfect for travel, and the finish is neat and classy.

The only reason for giving 4 stars instead of 5 is that there are minor scratches on the wheels, likely due to handling or drop point during delivery. It doesn’t affect functionality at all, but worth mentioning.

Overall, a great product at this price, durable and worth buying. Highly recommended for frequent travellers.

product_title: Genius Alley 66cm Medium Check-in Trolley Bag Hard Case Polypropylene, 4 Spinner Wheels, 360 Degree Wheeling Luggage, Travel Bag, Suitcase for Travel, Trolley Bags for Travel, Flintstone
review_body:
Safari Genius Bag Review

I recently purchased the Safari Genius trolley bag, and overall it’s a decent option for travelers who want a functional and stylish bag at a reasonable price. The design is smart, spacious, and the wheels roll smoothly, making it convenient for airport travel. The compartments are well thought out, and the zippers work without any issues.

However, I feel the build quality could be better. The material is lighter than expected and doesn’t feel as sturdy as some other Safari models. For frequent or heavy travelers, this might raise concerns about long-term durability. The handles and stitching are okay, but could use improvement to withstand rough handling.

Pros:

Stylish design, vibrant eye catching colors

Smooth wheels and easy maneuverability

Good storage space and compartments

Value for money

Cons:

Build quality feels average

Material is lighter than expected

Not ideal for very rough or frequent travel

Verdict:
The Safari Genius bag is a good choice for occasional travelers who want functionality and design at an affordable price. But if durability is your top priority, you may want to explore other sturdier models from Safari like the Pentagon.

Its been 6 months and I hardly used it . The trolley's one leg was broken and I had requested for repair. It was in warranty period they didn't even replied to me over chat for days. After multiple message they asked me to share the details and photos. They told they will sent a replacement for the legs .This confirmation came after 7 days of my initial request. Nov 3.

After that there was no reply for next 2 weeks. I again messaged them then the same story, I didn't get any reply.

I called that customer care, after multiple attempts call got connected. They told the same that they are looking in to this issue. They will be shipping the new wheel and I have shared my address. After that no reply for almost a month.

Today(12/10) I again messaged them for the updates. NO reply. Why do they keep a customer chat support like this if they can't reply. Waste of time !!!!. I emailed them @customercare@nashermiles.com with all the details and chat screenshots. After that I have called the customercare. Again the same old story that "We are looking in to this issue. will be fixing this ASAP." But this time they told they don't have the stock of wheel and they will contact me once it is available I have asked them to share specific date for this, but they were not ready to share. Actually they said they don't know the dates for. So it means it might take another 2 or 5 months or may be 1 year don't know and during this period I wont be able to use this. Also they don't have as shop also to go and get it fixed

Don't buy this if your are looking for after sales support.

product_title: Boston Hard-Sided Polypropylene Cabin Luggage 20 inch | 55cm | 8 Wheels Double Spinner Small Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Yellow)
review_body:
Positive Points:

Durability: The hard-sided polypropylene material of this luggage ensures exceptional durability. It withstands bumps, scratches, and rough handling during travel, keeping your belongings safe and secure.
Spaciousness: Despite its sleek design, the 24-inch (65CM) size offers ample space for packing. The expandable feature provides extra room when needed, making it perfect for longer trips or for those who tend to overpack.
Smooth Mobility: The multidirectional spinner wheels glide effortlessly, allowing for smooth maneuverability through crowded airports or busy streets. The telescopic handle extends and retracts smoothly, providing comfortable handling.
Stylish Design: The pastel purple color adds a touch of elegance and uniqueness to your travel ensemble. It stands out on the baggage carousel, making it easy to spot amidst a sea of generic black luggage.
Security: The integrated TSA-approved combination lock provides added security and peace of mind. You can travel with confidence knowing that your belongings are protected from unauthorized access.
Negative Points:

Weight: While the durability of the polypropylene material is commendable, it does contribute to the overall weight of the luggage. This might be a concern for travelers aiming to adhere strictly to weight restrictions imposed by airlines.
Limited Color Options: While the pastel purple color is visually appealing, some users may prefer more color options to suit their personal preferences or to coordinate with their existing luggage sets.
Conclusion:

The Nasher Miles Antwerp Expander Hard Sided Polypropylene Luggage in Pastel Purple, 24 Inch (65CM) is a stylish and reliable travel companion that offers durability, spaciousness, and security. Despite minor drawbacks such as weight and limited color options, its overall performance and quality make it a worthwhile investment for frequent travelers or anyone in need of a dependable check-in luggage solution.

product_title: Boston Hard-Sided Polypropylene Cabin Luggage 20 inch | 55cm | 8 Wheels Double Spinner Small Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Yellow)
review_body:
The zipper on my trolley completely failed within just four months of purchase, making it impossible to close and turning the entire trip into a mess. For a so-called “reputed” brand, this is unacceptable.

Any decent brand would replace the product or offer a refund under a one-year warranty, especially when the customer is staying abroad. Instead, Nasher Miles has shown zero efficiency, zero accountability, and absolutely no concern for customer experience. Their support is cheap, slow, and outright dismissive.

This is easily one of the worst post-purchase experiences I’ve had. In comparison, MOKOBARA is miles ahead in terms of product quality and customer service. Nasher Miles has completely lost my trust — never buying this low-quality trolley again.

review_body:
I recently purchased the Skybags Stroke large size hard luggage (75cm), and overall, my experience has been quite positive. The sturdy construction of the hard shell provides excellent protection for my belongings during travel.

The 75cm size is perfect for longer trips, offering ample space to pack all essentials without worrying about exceeding weight limits. The four-wheel system ensures smooth maneuverability through various surfaces, making it easy to navigate crowded airports or busy streets.

The interior design is well-thought-out with multiple compartments and straps to keep items organized and secure. The combination lock adds an extra layer of security, providing peace of mind while traveling.

However, I noticed that the outer shell is prone to scratches, which is somewhat expected with hard luggage. Despite this, the overall durability is commendable, and the scratches are not easily noticeable.

In terms of style, the design is sleek and modern, making it stand out on the baggage carousel. The telescopic handle is robust and comfortable to grip, and the overall build quality reflects the brand's commitment to durability.

Overall, the Skybags Stroke large size hard luggage (75cm) is a reliable travel companion that combines functionality, durability, and style. While it may show some signs of wear over time, it provides excellent value for the price, making it a solid investment for frequent travelers

To be honest, almost everyone is saying that there are many scratches on the exterior, but that is not fair. Actually there is a micro plastic coating all over the body which looks torn in many places. But that is not a matter of concern. Just need to remove the plastic coating from the body of the product it must be brighter than before, otherwise it will look dim.
After experiencing one week with a consecutive tour I can say that it has to be kept in mind that there is also a multiple colour coating over the trolley (outer surface... which seems colour full is actually a colour coating) . After back to back journey specially on flight and on train that colour coating can get removed as mine. It hurts a lot.

product_title: Cardiff Polyester 55 cms Blue Travel Duffle (DFCAR55BLU)
review_body: Nice light red colour, spacious but light, multiple pockets, smooth Skybags branded zippers, good quality external fabric and straps. The adjustable shoulder strap cannot be removed. Adequate padding on grab handles. 4 lugs provided at the bottom. Seemed like a small bag at first but when fully loaded will easily carry 3-4 days clothes to a cold destination. 02 Jeans, 4 full shirts, 4 tshirts, 02 track pants, 06 pairs of socks, 06 pairs of briefs, 03 hankies, 01 half sweater, 01 full sweater, 01 heavy jacket & there's room for more in the main compartment. The side compartments are large enough to hold toiletries, slippers, towel, chargers, selfie stick, torch, eyeglasses holder etc. The long pocket with the Skybags branding can easily hold a mini tripod. Do register the 03 year warranty at the website by scanning the Security QR code. As long as the weight is within 7 kg can easily serve as a nice cabin baggage. Total VFM.

review_body:
Just falling in love with the brand !

This is second purchase from Uppercase. Simply loved the purchase. I wanted something bigger than a cabin luggage and decided to buy this. I had already bought their shoulder sling and loved it.

From the time the package was delivered, I was impressed. The suitcase came in a sturdy card board box package ensuring no damage to the package inside. Even inside the package box, the suitcase in a thick plastic sleeve.

Once the suitcase was taken put...first impression was the colour combination...a combination of blackish blue with topography type line designs depicting travel. ...also, the corners and zipper innings were a shade of purplish blue which sets beautifully in contrast to the body of the suitcase. There are also spots of orange which gives it a certain brightness. Overall, i feel the suitcase will be easy to identify on the airport conveyor belts...from a distance !

Also, inside was abundant space with a pleasant surprise...1. There were additional independent sleeves available for shoes and folded formal shirts. 2. There is a expandable spacious section for segregating washable laundry from the main part of the suitcase...this is truly thoughtful and hence great design. The lining cloth are also a shade of orange..nice.

On the outside for practical utility...1. The handle of the suitcase is a contrast color to the suitcase. The handle feels tough and sturdy to handle, however the texture of the handle surface is soft to the skin..again a thoughtful design. 2. The wheels are the best..double wheel or 8 wheels if you will. Super easey to maneuvere. Also, the rubber on the wheels also feel of good quality.
3. The trolley handles and mechanism also feel tough and are of superior quality.

Overall I love the purchase. The product is attractive with spot on branding and vwry light weight.There is another silver lining...it is all made from recycled material, so this makes me feel that I did my bit for the environment.

This suitcase, although smaller, is as efficient as its larger counterpart. Its polycarbonate body is robust, protecting my belongings while withstanding travel's typical rough and tumble. The 8-wheel system is a dream, making moving around with the suitcase quite effortless.

Safety-wise, the TSA lock and anti-theft zippers are a great feature. They give me peace of mind, especially in crowded places. I also appreciate the printed eco trolley design, which shows the brand's commitment to sustainable practices.

product_title: Polycarbonate JFK (Large) 76cm | Hardsided Check-in Trolley Bag for Travel Spinner Luggage | 8 Wheel Trolley Bag |Suitcase for Unisex |2000 Days Warranty (Teal Blue)
review_body:
I'll be clear that I'm yet to use the bag however, I'll still write a review.

Absolutely loved the bag. It looks sturdy and yet is so lightweight, easy to handle. I got Large size and is significantly large.

They've went ahead and protected the design during packaging with thin plastic film that can easily peel off. They have mentioned it in photos and on the bag and I saw another review where someone didn't remove it and it looks horrible when it peels off in random places with rough handling during travel so I'll highly recommend you peel it off. It's hard to understand where to peel but whole bag has that so start anywhere. I recommend using nail,filler to get through the film. I'll also suggest using something mildly sharp or pointy that doesn't particularly scratch but will be helpful to remove the film from corners. I used my own nails and a blunt closed scissor. It's easy peel off just needs patience.

Bag looks high quality, absolutely love the design and finish. Everyone that saw it loved it. Though lightweight it is sturdy. Zipper looks of good quality, Internal space is huge as well. I'm overall impressed with the quality and amount I got it for. I'm not sure if it's scratch resistant or not however, I didn't find any scratches while using nails to peel the film and blunt scissors that I used on the corners.

review_body:
Bought in March 23. This review after two years of extensive use.
Pros:
1. Bright and easy to id on airport carousel
2. Nice size- packs in a lot of things
3. Reliable wheels
4. Sturdy Zips
Cons:
1. Lock is a bit fussy. Also number lock changed by a digit on its own- I had to get the new number by trial and error.
2. Warranty of 2000 days is a minsomer. They don't cover plastic peeling even though it is an integral part of the design. My design peeled off due to airport usage. Their reply below "Please note that our warranty does not cover damage caused by misuse (such as transportation of unusual items), neglect, damage by pets, accidents, abrasion, exposure to extreme conditions, solvents, acids, prolonged or unusual exposure to water, normal wear and tear, wrinkles on soft luggage, digital print, vegan leather trimmings, airline damage, or natural colour fading and peeling over time." So the warranty practically covers nothing!

For a guy, you can easily pack for 5-6 days trip to a warm summer place, and about 3 days for a winter trip.

review_body:
I bought the Uppercase Bullet Medium (66 cm) trolley bag in Silver and I am very happy with the purchase. The hard shell body feels very strong and durable, and the anti-scratch finish keeps it looking new even after rough handling at airports.

The best part is the inside compartments. There are separate sections for wet clothes and undergarments, which is very useful for short trips. Packing becomes very easy and organized. The space is more than enough for 4–5 days travel.

The wheels are super smooth and rotate 360°, so moving the bag is effortless even in crowded railway stations and airports. TSA lock and anti-theft zipper add extra security which gives peace of mind.

It looks premium, is lightweight, and very practical. Overall, excellent quality and value for money. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a stylish and strong trolley bag in this price range.

The spacious interior and clever compartment design make packing a breeze. The 8-wheel functionality ensures smooth navigation through bustling airports. The TSA lock and anti-theft zippers provide an added layer of security, which is reassuring for any traveler.

product_title: The Voyager 65cm German Polycarbonate Travel Luggage Check-in ZIPLESS Suitcase with 8 StealthTech Silent Wheels, Double TSA Locks & Aerospace Grade Wide Trolley (Burnt Era, Medium 24")
review_body:
I purchased 2 nos of Fur Jaden 65 cms zipless suitcases directly from seller. I wanted a zipperless suitcase to avoid zipper issues and for change (I have over 6 suitcases soft shell from good brands that still work fine except for small wear and tear in corners).

The downsides.

No warranty card
No product leaflet and specifications
Local Chinese locks with no TSA approved logo.
Made in China product overall.

It weigts about 4.2 kgs. The volume mentioned by the seller is 65 litres which i consider as gross volume and not useable volume.
Fit and finish from outside is fine but no one knows the grade of aluminum frame or the PC shell. The other hard plastics used have a poor quality feel and seems scratchy material.

The TSA locks are chinese make and they don't have the TSA logo (diamond logo) which raises doubts on the quality and durability of these locks which is the biggest negative in this suitcase. The male clamp for the lock are solid metal fixed to the frame. However, the female latches (which is in the lock to hold) is made of plastic which can result in breakge, wear and tear of the plastic making the suitcases useless.

There are just 2 hinges in the back and 2 locks in the front. The frame and the shell appear to be properly revetted. The hinges however have gaps on one side to the frame.

The wheels are just fine and I can't comment on how they would hold when loaded and put to use for travel.

The inside is nothing special with polyester lining cloth which seemed fine both at the top and the bottom. The top has some zippers to act as compartment for segregation. However fixing the fabric to the frame was patchy work indicating poor quality of finish. Most of the corners and bottom side is eaten away by the wheels and the telescopic handle (volume useable is less therefore). The compression strap is of worst quality in look and feel. The uneven and missed stitches on the compression strap are eye sore to look at giving a feel for poor quality very evidently.

The telescopic handle operates at 3 positions. God knows what air grade material is used but there is a play in handle which isn't desirable.

Overall, about 20K for two suitcases without product details, warranty card, noted issues in quality and un certified TSA locks of chinese make doesn't give much satisfaction and hope for durability and longevity.

Won't recommend it unless seller fairly provides good details of the product and fixes the known issues. The biggest downside is locks quality and specific quality issues.

Importers make huge money from chinese products but sadly quality is as well compromised for the customers.

product_title: Weekender Travel Duffle Bag with Separate Shoe/Laundry Compartment for Men & Women Made of Vegan Leather
review_body:
I recently purchased the Fur Jaden Weekender Travel Duffle Bag, and I must say, it's been a game-changer for my travels. The first thing that caught my eye was the sleek design and the quality of the vegan leather material. It looks and feels premium, without the guilt of using animal products.

One of the standout features for me is the separate shoe/laundry compartment. It's incredibly convenient to keep my shoes or dirty laundry separate from the main compartment, ensuring my clothes stay clean and organized throughout the trip. The compartment is spacious enough to fit a couple of pairs of shoes or a few days' worth of laundry, which is perfect for short trips.

The main compartment is roomy and well-designed, with enough space to fit all my essentials for a weekend getaway. The bag itself is lightweight, which is a relief when you're carrying it around airports or train stations.

Durability-wise, the bag seems robust and well-made. The stitching is sturdy, and the zippers glide smoothly. I've used it on a few trips already, and it still looks as good as new.

Another thoughtful feature is the multiple carrying options. It has sturdy handles for hand-carrying, as well as an adjustable shoulder strap for hands-free convenience. The strap is comfortable and doesn't dig into my shoulder even when the bag is fully packed.

Overall, I'm thoroughly impressed with the Fur Jaden Weekender Travel Duffle Bag. It combines style with functionality effortlessly. Whether you're a frequent traveler or someone who enjoys occasional getaways, this bag is definitely worth considering. It's a great investment that I'm sure will serve me well for many trips to come. Highly recommended!

Highly recommended for anyone looking for a functional, spacious, and well-made duffle bag for travel.
